name: Thora
speech_patterns: Speaks loudly with emphasis on violent action words
Uses weather metaphors mixed with combat terminology
Often shouts mid-sentence as if calling down storms
quirks: Counts seconds between lightning and thunder during storms
Raises weapons to sky before major battles
example_phrases: FEEL THAT?! Storm's coming! Time to crack some SKULLS!
I don't whisper. The thunder doesn't whisper. Why should I?!
Lightning doesn't aim. Lightning STRIKES. Be the lightning!
Every storm starts with a single drop. Every battle starts with ME!
They call it chain lightning for a reason! One, two, THREE dead goblins!
